prompt: Using the reference image of the powerful charging bull, generate a detailed 3D CAD model render. Show technical wireframe lines and smooth shaded surfaces against a digital engineering background.
prompt_refined: Generate an image that renders the powerful, muscular black bull from image 1, depicted in its characteristic charging forward pose. The bull should be presented as a detailed 3D CAD model, simultaneously showcasing its intricate wireframe mesh structure and its smooth, photorealistic shaded surfaces. Position the bull centrally within the frame, against a sophisticated digital engineering environment background, featuring subtle grid patterns, schematic elements, and blueprint-style interfaces.
objects: powerful, muscular black bull (centrally positioned, in a charging forward pose)
3D CAD model representation of the bull
intricate wireframe mesh structure (on the bull)
smooth, photorealistic shaded surfaces (on the bull)
